memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< double > v1, const std::vector< double > v2, double tolerance)
memberdef.name: vectorsDeviate

memberdef.argsstring: (StorageSingleton &storage, ros::NodeHandle node, std::string simulationType, std::string hand)
memberdef.name: KukieHand

briefdescription.para: Initializes the connection to the hand.
Method is called whenever destroy event occurs and ensures safe and clean termination of the programm (e.g. stops robot)
Closes connection between host computer and hand.
Opens and closes the hand according to the provided closing percentage and velocity.

parameterdescription.para: closing percentage (0.0 - hand fully open, 1.0 hand fully closed)
closing velocity in range between 0 and 1
